notes:
Burlingame has no existing entry in this repo yet (a 'Phase 2' city per pickleheads-court-research-prompts.md -- no cities/burlingame.html page). Researched using Burlingame's official Parks & Recreation page (burlingame.org/418/Tennis-Pickleball-Courts) as the primary source, its 4 individual facility detail pages, and cross-checked against Pickleheads (WebSearch synthesis only -- pickleheads.com returns HTTP 403 to direct WebFetch, consistent with this repo's other research sessions), globalpickleball.network, DailyPB, PicklePlay, Pickleballify, tennispickleballcalifornia.com, Yelp, and Bay Club's own site. Found 5 real, distinct, currently-operating public pickleball venues: the city operates 4 free facilities across 3 parks (Washington Park has two separately-reservable facilities -- Washington Park Courts and Washington Park Sports Court, both at 850 Burlingame Ave -- plus Ray Park Courts and Laguna Park Tennis Courts), and Bay Club - Broadway Tennis and Pickleball is a separate membership-required indoor club (60 Edwards Ct). Total 21 pickleball courts across 5 venues.

Pickleheads' own stated total (6 locations, 19 courts) does not cleanly match this, and digging into why turned up two likely phantom/duplicate Pickleheads listings rather than two genuinely missing venues: (1) A 'burlingame-community-center' Pickleheads slug (also picked up independently, with materially different and less trustworthy numbers, by maincourt.com and playpickleball.com) is almost certainly a duplicate of Washington Park Courts, not a separate venue -- the city's own page notes that pickleball nets can be borrowed 'at the Burlingame Community Center (same address)' as Washington Park, and it appears several aggregators mistook that equipment-loan mention for a distinct venue name. maincourt.com's version of this phantom listing states an unverified $5/person fee and 'membership required,' both of which directly contradict the city's own page (these are free, non-membership public courts) -- treated as a data-quality error, not included as a venue. (2) A second Pickleheads listing, 'bay-club-broadway-tennis' (without the '-and-pickleball' suffix), appears to be a duplicate/legacy listing for the exact same physical club at 60 Edwards Ct -- folded into the Bay Club entry's sources/notes rather than given its own record. Backing out these two apparent duplicates leaves 4 distinct names on Pickleheads (Washington Park, Ray Park, Laguna Park Tennis Courts, Bay Club Broadway), one below this file's 5 because Pickleheads does not appear to separately list Washington Park Sports Court at all -- a real gap on Pickleheads' side, though that venue's existence and 3-court count are independently corroborated by the city page, globalpickleball.network, and DailyPB.

Also investigated and explicitly excluded: 'Burlingame Country Club,' which turns up in several searches with '4 pickleball courts,' sourced mostly from burlingameccwnc.com -- a site that also serves unrelated North Carolina country-club content (Sapphire Valley / Cashiers / Blue Ridge Mountains templated copy) and should not be trusted as a factual source for this or any club. Independently verified via Yelp and Swimply that the real Burlingame Country Club's grounds are at 80 New Place Rd, Hillsborough, CA 94010 -- physically in Hillsborough, not Burlingame, despite the name (a classic name-collision, the same category of error san-mateo.json flagged with 'Westborough Park'). Excluded from this Burlingame-scoped file for that reason. Also checked and ruled out: Burlingame High School (1 Mangini Way) has 8 courts bookable via Facilitron, but every source describing them calls them tennis courts with no mention of pickleball striping or use -- not included. No evidence found of pickleball at Mercy High School, any Burlingame church/school gym, or a YMCA within Burlingame itself.

Open caveats a human should resolve before publishing: (1) Laguna Park Tennis Courts' street address is inconsistently reported as 1414 vs 1416 Laguna, and 'Street' vs 'Avenue' -- geocoding both numbers lands within ~5m of each other so the map pin is effectively unaffected, but the address string should be double-checked against the city's live facility page. (2) Washington Park Courts' hours read 'Sunrise to 10pm' on the city's own facility detail page but '7am-8pm' per one independent aggregator (tennispickleballcalifornia.com); the city page was treated as authoritative. (3) A $5 drop-in fee is real but applies only to an organized weekday-morning session at Washington Park -- the day/time is reported inconsistently across sources (Mon/Wed 10am-1pm, Mon/Wed/Fri 10am-1pm, or Mon 10:30am-12:30pm) -- it is not a general admission fee; ordinary walk-up play on the public courts remains free per the city's own page. (4) Bay Club Broadway's weekday closing time is reported as both 9pm and 10pm across two independent search syntheses; not resolved here. (5) googleMapsUrl is populated only for Washington Park (both of its facilities share the park's single Google Maps pin, since no separate pin exists for the Sports Court sub-facility specifically) and Bay Club Broadway, both from directly-observed google.com/maps?cid= result URLs reformatted to this repo's maps.google.com/?cid= convention with the same numeric cid; no numeric cid could be confirmed for Ray Park or Laguna Park despite specific searching, so both are left null rather than falling back to a lower-quality link format. lat/lon for all 5 venues come from a live OpenStreetMap Nominatim geocode of each address (not a synthesized estimate), so approxLocation is false throughout.

venues.name: Washington Park Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court. Court 1 is 4 dedicated pickleball courts with permanent lines; Courts 2 & 3 are tennis courts double-striped for pickleball (2 pickleball courts each); Court 4 remains tennis-only. One independent source describes the surface as acrylic-coated and newly resurfaced.
venues.netType: Dedicated permanent pickleball nets on Court 1; portable pickleball nets on the shared Court 2-3 tennis lines
venues.price: Free for walk-up or reserved play. A separate organized drop-in session run on weekday mornings reportedly charges a $5 fee -- see file-level notes; it is not a general admission charge.
venues.hours: Sunrise to 10pm daily; lights available at no charge until 10pm (one independent aggregator instead states 7am-8pm -- see notes)
venues.weather: Mild, occasional morning fog and afternoon bay breeze — flat San Mateo County city on the bay shoreline
venues.notes: Court count (4 dedicated + 4 shared = 8) is consistently corroborated across the city's own page, globalpickleball.network, DailyPB, and tennispickleballcalifornia.com. Pickleheads' own figure for its 'Washington Park' listing was ambiguous across different search syntheses (sometimes appearing as just 4) -- since pickleheads.com itself couldn't be directly fetched (403), it's unclear whether Pickleheads is only counting the dedicated Court 1 or something else; a human should check pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/burlingame/washington-park directly. googleMapsUrl points to the general 'Washington Park' Google Maps pin (confirmed via a live google.com/maps?cid= result), not a court-specific pin -- Google Maps doesn't appear to have a separate pin for this facility vs. the park overall or vs. Washington Park Sports Court. See file-level notes for the $5 drop-in fee, the hours discrepancy, and the excluded 'Burlingame Community Center' phantom listing that shares this address.

venues.name: Washington Park Sports Court
venues.surface: Outdoor multi-sport hard court; 3 courts striped for pickleball, sharing the slab with 1 full-size basketball court
venues.hours: Sunrise to 9pm daily; lights available at no charge until 9pm
venues.weather: Mild, occasional morning fog and afternoon bay breeze — flat San Mateo County city on the bay shoreline
venues.notes: This is a separate reservable facility (city facility ID 25) from Washington Park Courts (ID 24) even though it's the same park and street address -- the city's own page explicitly lists 'Washington Park Courts' and 'Washington Park Sports Court' as two of its 'four locations,' and independent aggregators (globalpickleball.network, DailyPB, tennispickleballcalifornia.com) all corroborate this exact 3-court breakdown separately from the main tennis complex's 8. Pickleheads does not appear to list this facility as its own entry (its 'Washington Park' page seems to only cover the dedicated Court 1) -- treated as a gap on Pickleheads' side rather than a conflict. googleMapsUrl reuses Washington Park's general pin since no distinct Google Maps pin for this sub-facility was found; lat/lon are the same geocode as Washington Park Courts (same street address).

venues.name: Ray Park Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court; 2 pickleball courts striped on Tennis Court #1 (the park's second tennis court remains tennis-only)
venues.netType: Portable pickleball nets on the striped tennis court
venues.hours: Sunrise to sunset daily, no fee
venues.weather: Mild, occasional morning fog and afternoon bay breeze — flat San Mateo County city on the bay shoreline
venues.notes: Court count (2, striped on Tennis Court #1) and 'newest pickleball courts in Burlingame' framing are consistent across the city page, Pickleheads, globalpickleball.network, and tennispickleballcalifornia.com -- no count conflict found. lights:false is sourced to Pickleheads' search-synthesized description ('no lights and limited parking'); the city's own facility page is simply silent on lighting rather than explicitly confirming or denying it. Address is 1525 Balboa Way per the city page and Yelp; Waze renders it '1525 Balboa Ave' and the community site burlingamepickleball.org says '1529 Balboa Avenue' -- both treated as minor errors on those secondary sources given the city+Yelp agreement on 1525/Way. No numeric Google Maps cid could be confirmed despite specific searching, so googleMapsUrl is left null per the task's instructions rather than using a lower-quality link format.

venues.name: Laguna Park Tennis Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court (2-court tennis facility); 1 pickleball court striped on each of the 2 tennis courts
venues.netType: Tennis net doubles as the pickleball net; height adjusted via a Velcro strap
venues.hours: Sunrise to sunset daily, no fee
venues.weather: Mild, occasional morning fog and afternoon bay breeze — flat San Mateo County city on the bay shoreline
venues.notes: Court count (2, one pickleball line per tennis court) and the tennis-net-doubles-as-pickleball-net detail are consistent across the city page, Pickleheads, and globalpickleball.network -- no count conflict. Address has a real, unresolved discrepancy: the city's own facility page text renders as '1414 Laguna Street,' Pickleheads/Waze render '1414 Laguna Avenue,' and Yelp plus burlingamepickleball.org render '1416 Laguna Ave' -- geocoding both 1414 and 1416 Laguna Avenue lands within about 5 meters of each other, so the coordinates above are reliable regardless, but the exact address string should be verified directly against the city's live page before publishing. amenities left empty and lights:false because one aggregator explicitly stated 'no lights, no shade, no restrooms' at this facility; the city page doesn't independently confirm or deny amenities. No numeric Google Maps cid found; left null.

venues.name: Bay Club - Broadway Tennis and Pickleball
venues.surface: Indoor hard court, 6 dedicated pickleball courts with permanent lines and nets under championship lighting
venues.hours: Mon-Fri 7:00am-9:00pm, Sat-Sun 7:00am-8:00pm (one source states a 10pm weekday close instead of 9pm -- unresolved, see file-level notes)
venues.notes: 6 indoor dedicated courts, membership requirement, and 60 Edwards Ct address are extremely well corroborated (bayclubs.com, Yelp, Pickleballify, PicklePlay, DailyPB, courtsource.us all agree, no conflicts). This repo already includes several comparable membership clubs elsewhere (Bay Club Pleasanton, Bay Club Santa Clara, Bay Club Gateway, Bay Club Walnut Creek, Bay Club Rolling Hills, etc.), so a membership-required indoor club fits established site convention. Pickleheads also separately lists 'Bay Club - Broadway Tennis' (without the '-and-pickleball' suffix) at what search results indicate is the same 60 Edwards Ct address -- treated as a duplicate/legacy Pickleheads listing for this same physical facility, not a second venue, and not given its own record. Weekday closing time conflicts across two independent search syntheses (9pm vs 10pm); not resolved -- a human should confirm directly with bayclubs.com/broadwaytennis before publishing if exact hours matter. googleMapsUrl's numeric cid was confirmed via a directly-observed google.com/maps?cid= result URL naming this exact venue.
